message:
feat(sentinel): add fr-sentinel crate with Phase 1 core types

Implement essence extraction from Redis sentinel.c and create the
fr-sentinel crate foundation with:
- InstanceFlags bitflags (MASTER, SLAVE, SENTINEL, S_DOWN, O_DOWN, etc.)
- FailoverState enum (None → WaitStart → SelectSlave → SendSlaveofNoone → etc.)
- SentinelAddr, InstanceLink, SentinelRedisInstance, SentinelState structs
- Timing constants (PING_PERIOD, INFO_PERIOD, TILT_TRIGGER, etc.)
- Basic state management (monitor, remove, check_tilt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
